records.question: Which Sales Representative jobs had an employee named Mattea Marvins with phone number 011.44.1346.329268 who was hired on or after 1987-08-20, earned a salary of at least 7200, had a commission percentage of at least 0.1, and whose job history ended exactly on 1998-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
WHERE job_history.end_date = '1998-12-31' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-20' AND employees.salary >= 7200 AND employees.commission_pct >= 0.1 AND employees.last_name = 'Marvins' AND employees.first_name = 'Mattea' AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1346.329268'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id 
FROM jobs 
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id 
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id 
WHERE jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' 
AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-20' 
AND employees.salary >= 7200 
AND employees.commission_pct >= 0.1 
AND employees.last_name = 'Marvins' 
AND employees.first_name = 'Mattea' 
AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1346.329268' 
AND job_history.end_date = '1998-12-31'

records.question: Which Sales Representative jobs have a minimum salary of 6000 and maximum salary of 12000, where the employee has phone number 011.44.1343.629268, email WSMITH, and was hired on or after 1987-08-27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
WHERE jobs.min_salary = 6000 AND jobs.max_salary = 12000 AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1343.629268' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-27' AND employees.email = 'WSMITH'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id 
FROM jobs 
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id 
WHERE jobs.min_salary = 6000 
  AND jobs.max_salary = 12000 
  AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' 
  AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1343.629268' 
  AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-27' 
  AND employees.email = 'WSMITH'

records.question: Which Sales Representative jobs in the Sales department have a minimum salary of at least 6000 and a maximum salary of at most 12000, where the job history started on or after 1998-03-24 and ended on or after 1998-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
JOIN departments ON job_history.department_id = departments.department_id
WHERE departments.department_name = 'Sales' AND job_history.end_date >= '1998-12-31' AND jobs.min_salary >= 6000 AND job_history.start_date >= '1998-03-24' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND jobs.max_salary <= 12000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id 
FROM jobs 
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id 
JOIN departments ON job_history.department_id = departments.department_id 
WHERE jobs.min_salary >= 6000 
  AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' 
  AND jobs.max_salary <= 12000 
  AND job_history.end_date >= '1998-12-31' 
  AND job_history.start_date >= '1998-03-24' 
  AND departments.department_name = 'Sales'

records.question: Which jobs offer a maximum salary of at least 5000 and have an employee with email IMIKKILI who earns at least 2700 and has a commission percentage of at most 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
WHERE jobs.max_salary >= 5000 AND employees.salary >= 2700 AND employees.email = 'IMIKKILI' AND employees.commission_pct <= 0.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT jobs.JOB_ID 
FROM jobs 
JOIN employees ON jobs.JOB_ID = employees.JOB_ID 
WHERE jobs.MAX_SALARY >= 5000 
AND employees.SALARY >= 2700 
AND employees.EMAIL = 'IMIKKILI' 
AND (employees.COMMISSION_PCT IS NULL OR employees.COMMISSION_PCT <= 0.0)

records.question: Which jobs have employees who were hired exactly on 1987-07-24 with a commission percentage of exactly 0.0, a minimum salary of at most 2000, and job history that started on or before 1999-01-01 and ended on or after 1999-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
WHERE employees.hire_date = '1987-07-24' AND job_history.start_date <= '1999-01-01' AND job_history.end_date >= '1999-12-31' AND employees.commission_pct = 0.0 AND jobs.min_salary <= 2000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT jobs.JOB_ID
FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.JOB_ID = employees.JOB_ID
JOIN job_history ON jobs.JOB_ID = job_history.JOB_ID
WHERE jobs.MIN_SALARY <= 2000
  AND employees.HIRE_DATE = '1987-07-24'
  AND employees.COMMISSION_PCT = 0.0
  AND job_history.START_DATE <= '1999-01-01'
  AND job_history.END_DATE >= '1999-12-31'

records.question: Which jobs with the exact title Accounting Manager have been held by employees in their job history?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
JOIN employees ON job_history.employee_id = employees.employee_id
WHERE jobs.job_title = 'Accounting Manager'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id 
FROM jobs 
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id 
JOIN employees ON job_history.employee_id = employees.employee_id 
WHERE jobs.job_title = 'Accounting Manager' 
GROUP BY jobs.job_id
